description: The practice of extracting knowledge from data — statistics, machine learning, visualization, algorithmic decision-making. The discipline that builds the tools the dome uses, and must answer for their biases.

dome_relevance.3: Fiscal — predictive models for cost, benefit calculation
dome_relevance.4: Health — clinical prediction, risk scoring, algorithmic triage

sphere_relevance.4: Economic — property valuation models, economic forecasting
sphere_relevance.5: Social — demographic modeling, foot traffic prediction
